rationale: Educ. Code §21.409 governs educator leave of absence for temporary disability and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Each full-time educator employed by a school district shall be given a leave of absence for temporary disability at any time the educator's condition interferes with the performance of regular duties.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator leave statute.
